1.author: Ahmed Ali
1.text: TRULY WE REVEALED it on the Night of Determination.

1.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
1.text: We have indeed sent down the Qur’an in the Night of Destiny.

1.author: Arberry
1.text: Behold, We sent it down on the Night of Power;

1.author: Daryabadi
1.text: Verily We! We have sent it down on the night of Power.

1.author: Hilali & Khan
1.text: Verily! We have sent it (this Quran) down in the night of Al-Qadr (Decree)

1.author: Itani
1.text: We sent it down on the Night of Decree.

1.author: Maududi
1.text: Behold, We revealed this (Qur'an) on the Night of Power.

1.author: Mubarakpuri
1.text: Verily, We have sent it down in the Night of Al-Qadr.

1.author: Pickthall
1.text: Lo! We revealed it on the Night of Predestination.

1.author: Qarai
1.text: Indeed We sent it down on the Night of Ordainment.

1.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
1.text: We sent this (the Holy Koran) down on the Night of Honor.

1.author: Saheeh International
1.text: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.

1.author: Sarwar
1.text: We revealed the Quran on the Night of Destiny.

1.author: Shakir
1.text: Surely We revealed it on the grand night.

1.author: Wahiduddin Khan
1.text: We sent it [Quran] down on the Night of Destiny.

1.author: Yusuf Ali
1.text: We have indeed revealed this (Message) in the Night of Power:

2.author: Ahmed Ali
2.text: How will you know what the Night of Determination is?

2.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
2.text: And what have you understood, what the Night of Destiny is!

2.author: Arberry
2.text: And what shall teach thee what is the Night of Power?

2.author: Daryabadi
2.text: And what shall make thee know that which the night of Power is?

2.author: Hilali & Khan
2.text: And what will make you know what the night of Al-Qadr (Decree) is?

2.author: Itani
2.text: But what will convey to you what the Night of Decree is?

2.author: Maududi
2.text: And what do you know what the Night of Power is?

2.author: Mubarakpuri
2.text: And what will make you know what the Night of Al-Qadr is

2.author: Pickthall
2.text: Ah, what will convey unto thee what the Night of Power is!

2.author: Qarai
2.text: And what will show you what is the Night of Ordainment?

2.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
2.text: What could let you know what the Night of Honor is!

2.author: Saheeh International
2.text: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

2.author: Sarwar
2.text: Would that you knew what the Night of Destiny is!

2.author: Shakir
2.text: And what will make you comprehend what the grand night

2.author: Wahiduddin Khan
2.text: And what will make you comprehend what the Night of Destiny is?

2.author: Yusuf Ali
2.text: And what will explain to thee what the night of power is?

3.author: Ahmed Ali
3.text: Better is the Night of Determination than a thousand months.

3.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
3.text: The Night of Destiny is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Arberry
3.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months;

3.author: Daryabadi
3.text: The night of Power is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Hilali & Khan
3.text: The night of Al-Qadr (Decree) is better than a thousand months (i.e. worshipping Allah in that night is better than worshipping Him a thousand months, (i.e. 83 years and 4 months).

3.author: Itani
3.text: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Maududi
3.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Mubarakpuri
3.text: The Night of Al-Qadr is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Pickthall
3.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Qarai
3.text: The Night of Ordainment is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
3.text: The Night of Honor is better than a thousand months,

3.author: Saheeh International
3.text: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Sarwar
3.text: (Worship) on the Night of Destiny is better than (worship) for a thousand months.

3.author: Shakir
3.text: The grand night is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Wahiduddin Khan
3.text: The Night of Destiny is better than a thousand months;

3.author: Yusuf Ali
3.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.

3.author: Transliteration
3.text: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahrin

4.author: Ahmed Ali
4.text: On (this night) the angels and grace descend by the dispensation of their Lord, for settling all affairs.

4.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
4.text: In it descend the angels and Jibreel, by the command of their Lord – for all works.

4.author: Arberry
4.text: in it the angels and the Spirit descend, by the leave of their Lord, upon every command.

4.author: Daryabadi
4.text: The angels and the spirit descend therein by the command of their Lord with His decrees for every affair.

4.author: Hilali & Khan
4.text: Therein descend the angels and the Ruh [Jibrael (Gabriel)] by Allah's Permission with all Decrees,

4.author: Itani
4.text: In it descend the angels and the Spirit, by the leave of their Lord, with every command.

4.author: Maududi
4.text: The angels along with the Spirit descend in it by the permission of their Lord with all kinds of decrees.

4.author: Mubarakpuri
4.text: Therein descend the angels and the Ruh by their Lord's permission with every matter.

4.author: Pickthall
4.text: The angels and the Spirit descend therein, by the permission of their Lord, with all decrees.

4.author: Qarai
4.text: In it the angels and the Spirit descend, by the leave of their Lord, with every command.

4.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
4.text: in it the angels and the Spirit (Gabriel) descend by the permission of their Lord upon every command.

4.author: Saheeh International
4.text: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

4.author: Sarwar
4.text: On this Night, the angels and the spirit descend by the permission of their Lord with His decree (to determine everyone's destiny).

4.author: Shakir
4.text: The angels and Jibreel descend in it by the permission of their Lord for every affair,

4.author: Wahiduddin Khan
4.text: on that night, the angels and the Spirit come down by the permission of their Lord with His decrees for all matters;

4.author: Yusuf Ali
4.text: Therein come down the angels and the Spirit by Allah's permission, on every errand:

4.author: Transliteration
4.text: Tanazzalu almalaikatu waalrroohu feeha biithni rabbihim min kulli amrin

5.author: Ahmed Ali
5.text: It is peace till the dawning of the day.

5.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
5.text: It is peace until the rising of dawn.

5.author: Arberry
5.text: Peace it is, till the rising of dawn.

5.author: Daryabadi
5.text: It is all peace, until the rising of the dawn.

5.author: Hilali & Khan
5.text: Peace! (All that night, there is Peace and Goodness from Allah to His believing slaves) until the appearance of dawn.

5.author: Itani
5.text: Peace it is; until the rise of dawn.

5.author: Maududi
5.text: All peace is that night until the rise of dawn.

5.author: Mubarakpuri
5.text: There is peace until the appearance of dawn.

5.author: Pickthall
5.text: (The night is) Peace until the rising of the dawn.

5.author: Qarai
5.text: It is peaceful until the rising of the dawn.

5.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
5.text: Peace it is, till the break of dawn.

5.author: Saheeh International
5.text: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.

5.author: Sarwar
5.text: This Night is all peace until the break of dawn.

5.author: Shakir
5.text: Peace! it is till the break of the morning.

5.author: Wahiduddin Khan
5.text: it is all peace till the break of dawn.

5.author: Yusuf Ali
5.text: Peace!... This until the rise of morn!
